final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input [3:0] stock,
    output reg hay          
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin       
            case(stock)
                4'b0000: hay = 0;   
                default: hay = 1;   
            endcase
    end
endmodule
